svg.title: Automataii assembly guide four-bar-basic
svg.desc: Board-coordinate assembly guide for Four-bar linkage.
svg.text: Follow one card at a time. Keep fasteners loose until motion is smooth.
Pin ground pivots at I5 and I9.

g.text: Repeat this stack at I5, I9
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Place L2 from I5 toward G6 with spacers.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Join L4 to the free input-link hole near G6, then point the other end toward G10.

g.text: Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Place L2 from G10 back to I9.

g.text: All pivots move when the input link turns.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.

svg.text: Fasten the L4 coupler to the free output-link hole near G10 only (not the board).

g.text: The G10 joint floats with the links and is not pinned to the board.
Spacer rule: spacer below moving part.
Paper fastener tabs stay loose until tested.
